overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic covered market arcade with neon signage and food stalls, transitioning into a small convenience shop interior. The scene features a cyberpunk aesthetic with bright artificial neon lighting mixed with natural sunlight filtering through the translucent roof structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian market arcade with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market arcade passing various food stalls and neon signs

notable_agents.action: sitting at food stall counter eating
walking away from camera down the arcade

entered.detail: translucent roof structure with metal support beams allowing sunlight to filter through
open-air food counter with bright green stools and steam rising from cooking equipment
blue neon sign with zigzag pattern above shop entrance
large structural pillars lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking through a bustling covered market arcade with a high translucent roof structure allowing sunlight to filter through. Food stalls with green stools line the right side while neon signs and shop fronts are visible ahead. Pedestrians are scattered throughout, some walking and others seated at the counters.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial shop entrance with beaded curtain doorway

events.description: passing through the beaded curtain doorway into the shop interior

agents.ego_description: approaching the Cali Express shop and entering through the beaded curtain doorway

entered.detail: large illuminated circular sign with green 'C' logo and 'CALI EXPRESS' text
green and blue beaded curtain acting as entrance to the shop interior
yellow vending machine with 'Insta Food' signage

segments.scene_description: Approaching the Cali Express shop entrance marked by a prominent green neon sign. The camera moves toward and passes through a beaded curtain doorway, transitioning from the open arcade into the shop interior. The food stalls and main arcade structure fall behind as the entrance area comes into focus.

scene_state.functional_zone: small convenience shop interior with vending machines and service counter

events.description: lighting shifts from bright mixed natural-artificial to dimmer artificial indoor lighting
slowing approach toward the service counter at the back of the shop

agents.ego_description: moving through the shop interior examining vending machines and approaching the service counter

notable_agents.action: standing behind the service counter looking toward the camera

entered.detail: green and yellow vending machines with illuminated product displays including 'Insta Food' and 'Keelou Beans'
metal rack with magazines and brochures near the entrance wall
glass service counter with illuminated interior and metal security mesh

segments.scene_description: Inside the dimly lit convenience shop, the camera explores the compact interior space. Vending machines and a magazine rack are visible near the entrance, while a service counter with an NPC shopkeeper occupies the far wall. The lighting is predominantly artificial with a moody cyberpunk atmosphere, contrasting with the brighter arcade outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bright, bustling covered market into the moody, enclosed interior of a small convenience shop. It begins by gliding through a wide arcade under a translucent roof where sunlight filters down onto food stalls and scattered pedestrians. As the camera advances, the open atmosphere of the market narrows toward the entrance of a Cali Express shop, marked by a glowing green neon sign. The scene then shifts as the camera passes through a beaded curtain, leaving the bright arcade behind to enter a dimly lit interior. Finally, the view explores the compact shop space, moving past vending machines and a magazine rack toward a service counter and shopkeeper under artificial cyberpunk lighting.
